data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Substitution history tracking' feature, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or data regarding the tracking of substitution history, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical functionality in the evidence leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of substitution history tracking implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
